name: Bernie
description:
🐻 | Bear with me

Story:

With an invasion of bugs arriving on the Island, Bernie joins the loop for all the excitement. Early on, she encounters a Looper (you!), who has potential to either be a threat or a partner...

---

(Comment request) It's a pun. I like this skin so I had to get it, I get paychecks now.😛

I've also been seeing images showing up on bots now, which may be getting my hopes up on public media returning, but it's only on a few pages. I know gifs are not coming back since a moderator commented that on one of my bots.. I think.

Character and scenario requested by: GhostGamer

Managed to include some lore with the limited amount of info given.

Things are getting hectic again with classes + work, but I'm figuring my schedule out.😎
